zh.lifeSummary: 當Sybille de Châtellerault於大約1075年出生在法國波特-哈倫斯維安a特勒勞爾特時，她的父親Vicomte Boson II de Chatellerault41歲，母親Aliénor de Thouars de Mauleon22歲。她於大約1100年與Hugues, I d'Amboise結婚。他們至少是1個女兒的父母。她去世於大約1140年在英國英格蘭萊希斯特斯爾馬可特 博斯沃斯享年67歲。

meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Sybille
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Sybil
meanings: From the name (Greek Sibylla or Sybilla, with confusion over the vowels from an early period) of a class of ancient prophetesses inspired by Apollo. According to medieval theology, they were pagans denied the knowledge of Christ but blessed by God with some insight into things to come and accordingly admitted to heaven. It was thus regarded as a respectable name to be borne by Christians. This name was introduced to England by the Normans and enjoyed considerable popularity in the Middle Ages.

en.lifeSummary: When Sybille de Châtellerault was born about 1075, in Châtellerault, Vienne, Poitou-Charentes, France, her father, Vicomte Boson II de Chatellerault, was 41 and her mother, Aliénor de Thouars de Mauleon, was 22. She married Hugues, I d'Amboise about 1100. They were the parents of at least 1 daughter. She died about 1140, in Market Bosworth, Leicestershire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 67.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sybille de Châtellerault est née environ 1075, à Châtellerault, Vienne, Poitou-Charentes, France, son père, Vicomte Boson II de Chatellerault, avait 41 ans et sa mère, Aliénor de Thouars de Mauleon, avait 22 ans. Elle a épousé Hugues, I d'Amboise environ 1100. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fille. Elle est décédée environ 1140, à Market Bosworth, Leicestershire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 67 ans.

Sie hat um 1100 Hugues, I d'Amboise geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Tochter. Sie starb um 1140 im Alter von 67 Jahren in Market Bosworth, Leicestershire, England, United Kingdom.

ja.lifeSummary: Sybille de Châtelleraultが約1075年にフランスポイトウ-チャーエンツヴィエンチaテラーアウルトで生まれた時，父Vicomte Boson II de Chatelleraultは41歳，母Aliénor de Thouars de Mauleonは22歳であった。約1100年にHugues, I d'Amboiseと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の娘の親であった。彼女は約1140年にイギリスイギリスレアイセステルシュアイアマーケト ボスウオルスで67歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Sybille de Châtellerault(이)가 대략 1075년 프랑스 포이토우-처츠 비니 cha텔레라트에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Vicomte Boson II de Chatellerault(은)는 41세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Aliénor de Thouars de Mauleon(은)는 22세였다. 그녀는 대략 1100년 Hugues, I d'Amboise(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 대략 1140년 영국 잉글랜드 레이스스터실르 마크트 보스워스에서 67세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sybille de Châtellerault родилась около 1075 г. в местности чaтеллираулт, виенн, поитоу-чарентесь, Франция, её отцу по имени Vicomte Boson II de Chatellerault было 41 год, а матери, которую звали Aliénor de Thouars de Mauleon, 22. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Hugues, I d'Amboise около 1100 г. У них была по крайней мере 1 дочь. Она умерла около 1140 г. в местности маркет босворт, лисестиршир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 67 лет.
